mapper.select:
SELECT * FROM ( SELECT /*UsimReturnMapper.noticeList */ A.NOTICE_ID , A.TITLE AS LIST_TITLE , A.TITLE AS TITLE , A.CONTENTS , A.DELETE_YN , A.POST_STRT_DT , A.POST_END_DT , A.REGST_ID , TO_CHAR(A.REGST_DTTM, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') REGST_DTTM , A.RVISN_ID , TO_CHAR(A.RVISN_DTTM, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') RVISN_DTTM , B.TYPE_CD , A.REGST_ORGN_NM , A.REGST_USR_NM , DECODE( ( (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ORG_FILE_MGMT_MST WHERE ORGN_ID = A.NOTICE_ID AND ATT_SCTN = 'NTC') ), 0, 0, 1) FILE_YN, P_NOTICE_ID, A.NOTICE_ID || P_NOTICE_ID AS SEQ FROM CMN_PSC_NOTICE_MST A , (SELECT TYPE_CD FROM ORG_ORGN_INFO_MST WHERE ORGN_ID = #{SESSION_USER_ORGN_ID} ) B WHERE 1=1 AND NVL(A.ORGN10,'0') = '1' AND A.DELETE_YN = 'N' AND A.P_NOTICE_ID IS NULL
AND UPPER(A.TITLE) LIKE '%' || UPPER(#{TITLE}) || '%'
AND UPPER(A.REGST_USR_NM) LIKE '%' || UPPER(#{REGST_USR_NM}) || '%'
AND UPPER(A.REGST_ORGN_NM) LIKE '%' || UPPER(#{REGST_ORGN_NM} )|| '%'
AND A.POST_STRT_DT <= TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(#{SRCH_END_DT,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, 'YYYYMMDD'), 'YYYYMMDD') AND A.POST_STRT_DT >= TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(#{SRCH_STRT_DT,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, 'YYYYMMDD'), 'YYYYMMDD')
UNION ALL SELECT /*UsimReturnMapper.noticeList */ C.NOTICE_ID , DECODE(nvl(C.P_NOTICE_ID,'-1'),'-1','',chr(9) || '└ ') || C.TITLE AS LIST_TITLE , C.TITLE, C.CONTENTS , C.DELETE_YN , C.POST_STRT_DT , C.POST_END_DT , C.REGST_ID , TO_CHAR(C.REGST_DTTM, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') REGST_DTTM , C.RVISN_ID , TO_CHAR(C.RVISN_DTTM, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') RVISN_DTTM , B.TYPE_CD , C.REGST_ORGN_NM , C.REGST_USR_NM , DECODE( ( (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ORG_FILE_MGMT_MST WHERE ORGN_ID = C.NOTICE_ID AND ATT_SCTN = 'NTC') ), 0, 0, 1) FILE_YN, C.P_NOTICE_ID, C.P_NOTICE_ID || C.NOTICE_ID AS SEQ FROM CMN_PSC_NOTICE_MST A , CMN_PSC_NOTICE_MST C , (SELECT TYPE_CD FROM ORG_ORGN_INFO_MST WHERE ORGN_ID = #{SESSION_USER_ORGN_ID} ) B WHERE 1=1 AND A.NOTICE_ID = C.P_NOTICE_ID AND NVL(A.ORGN10,'0') = '1' AND A.DELETE_YN = 'N' AND C.DELETE_YN = 'N'
AND UPPER(A.TITLE) LIKE '%' || UPPER(#{TITLE}) || '%'
AND UPPER(A.REGST_USR_NM) LIKE '%' || UPPER(#{REGST_USR_NM}) || '%'
AND UPPER(A.REGST_ORGN_NM) LIKE '%' || UPPER(#{REGST_ORGN_NM} )|| '%'
AND A.POST_STRT_DT <= TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(#{SRCH_END_DT,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, 'YYYYMMDD'), 'YYYYMMDD') AND A.POST_STRT_DT >= TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(#{SRCH_STRT_DT,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, 'YYYYMMDD'), 'YYYYMMDD')
) AA ORDER BY AA.SEQ

SELECT /* cmn.board.mapper.getFile */ ATT_ROUT /* 파일경로 */ , FILE_NM /* 파일명 */ , FILE_ID /* 파일ID */ FROM ORG_FILE_MGMT_MST OFMM , CMN_PSC_NOTICE_MST CNM WHERE CNM.NOTICE_ID = OFMM.ORGN_ID AND OFMM.ATT_SCTN = 'NTC' AND CNM.DELETE_YN = 'N' AND OFMM.ORGN_ID = #{NOTICE_ID, jdbcType=VARCHAR} ORDER BY OFMM.REG_DTTM

/* PayInfoMapper.getFileExtList */ SELECT COUNT(1) FROM CMN_GRP_MST A , CMN_GRP_CD_MST B WHERE 1=1 AND A.GRP_ID = B.GRP_ID AND A.USG_YN = 'Y' AND B.USG_YN = 'Y' AND A.GRP_ID = 'CMN0232' AND B.CD_VAL = UPPER(#{ext, jdbcType=VARCHAR})
